title: Expansive Evolutions
description: forge 1.19.4. made with Mcreator. just adds random stuff.
body:
Welcome to "Expansive Evolutions," the thrilling Minecraft mod for Forge 1.19.4 created for the purpose of adding random new things to the game without changing the game TOO much. With an arsenal of firearms like pistols, AK-47s, and snipers, captivating creatures like deer, ducks, and wraiths, and enchanting items like mugs, coffee, coffee beans, and speed charms, this mod adds excitement to your gameplay. Join our community on Discord (@duckypolice) or contact us at cooltomato12@gmail.com for updates and to share your ideas.

Get ready for an ever-evolving adventure with "Expansive Evolutions"!
